org.arakhne.neteditor.io.bitmap

Class ImageIOBitmapExporter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.bitmap.ImageIOBitmapExporter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BitmapExporter

    public class ImageIOBitmapExporter
extends Object
implements BitmapExporter
    This class provides the base feature for all the bitmap exporters.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Detail

      • getProgression

        public Progression getProgression()
        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Specified by:
        getProgression in interface BitmapExporter
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

      • setProgression

        public void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Specified by:
        setProgression in interface BitmapExporter
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • write

        public boolean write(OutputStream stream,
            ViewComponentContainer<?,?> container,
            float scale)
              throws IOException
        Exports the file.
        Specified by:
        write in interface BitmapExporter
        Parameters:
        stream - the output
        container - is the container of view componets to export.
        scale - is the scaling factor from the model coordinate system to the pixels of the procuded image. For example, a value of 2 means that the produced image will be 2 times larger than the exported model.
        Returns:
        success status.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • generateImage

        protected Image generateImage(ViewComponentContainer<?,?> container,
                  float scale,
                  Progression progression)
        Generate the image.
        Parameters:
        container - is the component to render.
        scale - is the scaling factor to apply to the image.
        progression - is the progression model to use.
        Returns:
        the generated image.

      • writeImage

        protected void writeImage(OutputStream stream,
              Image image,
              Progression progression)
                   throws IOException
        Write the given image into the specified stream.
        Parameters:
        stream -
        image -
        progression -
        Throws:
        IOException

      • isShadowExported

        public boolean isShadowExported()
        Description copied from interface: BitmapExporter
        Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Specified by:
        isShadowExported in interface BitmapExporter
        Returns:
        true if the shadows of the objects are also exported.

      • setShadowExported

        public void setShadowExported(boolean export)
        Description copied from interface: BitmapExporter
        Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Specified by:
        setShadowExported in interface BitmapExporter
        Parameters:
        export - is true if the shadows of the objects are exported.
